Package jline.solvers.taussa.events

Class ArrivalEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.solvers.taussa.events.Event
      • jline.solvers.taussa.events.ArrivalEvent
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, NodeEvent
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ClassSwitchArrivalEvent, NodeArrivalEvent, SinkArrivalEvent
    public class ArrivalEvent
extends Event
implements NodeEvent, Serializable
